summary: Iteration 111 - 8 New Features Testing Complete. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All 6 frontend panels render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX: /marketplace/review-analytics route was being caught by /marketplace/{template_id} - fixed by reordering route registration in server.py to register advanced_features_routes BEFORE marketplace_routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 new features working: 1) Webhook dead-letter queue (/workspaces/{ws_id}/webhooks/dead-letters), 2) Orchestration scheduling CRUD, 3) Benchmark comparison, 4) 5 built-in collaboration templates, 5) Template installation creates real orchestrations, 6) Review analytics with stats/sentiment/trend, 7) Security dashboard with auth/webhooks/platform stats, 8) Advanced marketplace search with filters. Route registration order fix: advanced_features_routes must be registered before marketplace_routes to prevent /marketplace/{template_id} catching /marketplace/review-analytics.

frontend_panels_verified.SecurityDashboard: ?tab=security - Shows Active Sessions, Failed Logins, Locked Accounts, Total Users, Webhook Health, Platform Overview, Security Checklist
frontend_panels_verified.CollabTemplatesPanel: ?tab=collab-templates - Shows 5 templates (Research & Summarize, Draft Review Edit, Multi-Perspective Analysis, Code Review Pipeline, Q&A Knowledge Pipeline) with Install buttons
frontend_panels_verified.OrchSchedulePanel: ?tab=orch-schedules - Shows empty state with New Schedule button
frontend_panels_verified.BenchmarkCompare: ?tab=benchmark-compare - Shows agent selector dropdown and empty state
frontend_panels_verified.ReviewAnalyticsPanel: ?tab=review-analytics - Shows Total Reviews, Avg Rating, Positive/Negative %, Rating Distribution, Sentiment Overview
frontend_panels_verified.MarketplaceAdvancedSearch: ?tab=marketplace-search - Shows search input, Filters button, Most Popular sort, template cards
